faqs.question: How can I get into Bhopal Institute of Technology and Management for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Bhopal Institute of Technology and Management has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.E. / B.Tech Candidate must have completed 10+2 or equivalent with Physics, Maths & Chemistry/ Biotech./ Biology/ Tech. Voc. subject/ Comp. Sc./ IT/ Informatics Practices/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business studies as optional subjects with the above-mentioned aggregate percentage (40% for SC/ST/OBC candidates (except Creamy layer) candidates belonging to Madhya Pradesh) in subjects taken together. Candidates passed 10+2 with grading system, must have grades equi. to mentioned aggregate %. Candidates who had passed 10+2 with grace marks in any subject can also apply provided they have scored mentioned aggregate % excluding grace marks. Result awaited student are also eligible on provisional basis. OR Candidate who have passed Diploma in Engg. & Tech. examination with at least 45% masks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC (excluding creamy layer) category of Madhya Pradesh) Subject to vacancies in the First Year, in case the vacancies at lateral entry are exhausted.

highlights.summary:
The TANCET 2026 application form is live until Apr 10, 2026, for St. Joseph s College of Engineering and Technology, Thanjavur admission to the MBA course. Also, the TANCET exam 2026 is scheduled for May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: St. Joseph's College of Engineering and Technology, Thanjavur offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech. On the other hand, at the PG level, the St. Joseph's College of Engineering and Technology, Thanjavur offers M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fees for St. Joseph's College of Engineering and Technology, Thanjavur courses range between INR 80,000 to 2,20,000.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of St. Joseph’s College of Engineering and Technology, Thanjavur.

review_content.Placements: Placements at this college in our course are good. Around 80% of students get placed in reputed companies during the placement drive in our college. The highest salary package offered in our course is 12 LPA. The average salary package offered is around 4 LPA - 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Appz Global, ESAF Bank, and Decathlon.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is very beautiful. It has a campus. There are separate hostels for boys named St. Mary, and a girls' hostel named St. Augustine. There is a beautiful catholic style building. This college has various sports events like basketball, volleyball, and cricket.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college for an MBA.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides good placement opportunities. Placements for the senior batch were good, and ours will start in September. The highest, lowest, and average salaries offered were 8 lakhs, 2.5 lakhs, and 4 lakhs, respectively. Most companies visiting our college are marketing and finance oriented. About 30% of our students get internships right out of college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The labs are well-equipped with systems that each student can use individually. In addition to the departmental library, there is a central library with adequate books. The sports and games are good, and the MBA classrooms are air-conditioned. Our college has the best canteen, and the food is delicious. The hostel room is not bad.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Really proud of our college because our college one of the best college in thanjavur district.

review_content.Placements: 1. Maximum strength in our college have mechanical engineering course. The salary offered ranges from Rs. 10,000 - 25,000. Information tech, TCS came for the recruitment. reviews.review_heading: Reviewing IBMRD's Academics and Campus Life.
reviews.review_text: We have great infrastructure available in our college, with good parking, spacious classrooms with smart learning facilities, computer labs, a library, playground, and cafeteria. The quality of the hostels is good; girls and boys have different hostels with security.

reviews.review_heading: Not really satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: There are some good and bad things about college, like a lack of basic facilities like water and cleaning. No Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms have one projector for every department. The campus is not maintained and is not a good sports ground. The hostel is on a first-come, first-served basis, with admission preference given to first-year students. Hostel fees is 22k and 1k deposit and mess deposit is 1k. The food quality is medium.

reviews.review_heading: I strongly recommend going to another college if you want to get good knowledge.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty members and environment are good. It is a great place to explore your ideas and knowledge.

review_content.Placements: Almost 95% of the students got placed in our batch. The highest salary package offered is 7 LPA, the lowest salary package offered is 1.5 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies of our college are Cease Fire, Byju's, ICICI Bank, etc. Almost 100% of the students got internships in different sectors. Top roles offered to the students are HR, process analyst, store manager, marketing supervisor and process associate.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is quite good. The hostel environment was very good, and the food quality was also good. The canteen, medical facilities and sports and games were below average. Classrooms were quite good, but the library wasn't good because it was for the public. Outsiders are also allowed to access the library room.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: BCCM is the best management college in Eastern India.

review_content.Placements: All students of our course get good placements, and many of them get multiple placements. The highest salary package offered is 6.5 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 3.4 LPA during our tenure. Top recruiting companies every year are from banking, finance, retail, marketing and hospital sectors. All students get internships, and also some of them got pre-placement offers. From the healthcare and hospital branch, students of our batch got good quality jobs in hospitals like KIIMS, Panda Cancer Hospital and Shree Hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a very good infrastructure in our college. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and there are air-conditioned classrooms. In the library, there are course study books, along with competitive books to attend competitive examinations like banking, railways, SSC, etc. Our hostel is neat and clean, and two students accommodate in each room. There is a canteen which serves hygienic and tasty food. Sports and games facilities are very much available like cricket, volleyball, boxing, carrom, table tennis, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Rakshpal Bahadur Management Institute, Greater Noida.

content.Placements: Placements are average in our college. Many students got placed in companies. Around 75-80% of students got placed in our college. Companies like Wipro, TCS, etc., visit our college. Some students got internships. Many students got off-campus placements because our college does not provide high salary packages.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the department is quite good. Wi-Fi, medical facilities, etc., are good.
content.Faculty: Our department teachers are professionals. They are good and supportive. They have good knowledge and command of their subjects. Semester exams are according to the level of study they provide us. The difficulty level of semester exams is quite good.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It is the place of excellence and knowledge.

content.Placements: Campus placements are outstanding. All the reputed companies visit every placement fair. They found the best ones as per their requirements. I got placed in HDFC Insurance Ltd., as a senior associate in the branch operation department. I got a package of 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is very good. Its basic quality is the environment of college premises. The campus is lush green and airy. The college has labs and classrooms. The faculty members are supportive. The hostel area is peaceful, and the wardens of girls' and boys' hostels take care of like parents.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am thankful to RBMI, Greater Noida, for helping start my career.

content.Placements: The placements are excellent. Many companies such as Airtel, TVS and various banks such as IDFC, Kotak, etc., visit the campus every year. 70% of the students get placed very easily. I was offered a package of 3.6 Lacs per annum. I am highly thankful to RBMI placement officer, Mr Kushagra Bhardwaj, for helping me get placed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. All the required amenities are available for learning. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The hostel has all the facilities, and the food quality is decent and tasty. All kinds of sports events are organised every year, such as cricket, volleyball, and badminton.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Corporate needed management course provided by RBMi Bareilly.

content.Placements: Currently I am doing MBA but I have been student of BBA at RBMI. About 85% students of RBMI Bareilly campus of MBA department were placed successfully due to campus interview provided by institute. Top recruiters were Airtel, vishal mega mart, and triveni almirah etc. Institute provided adequate training for placement like group discussion, mock interview, interaction with HR managers. Industrial visits were also provided to get awareness about corporate culture.
content.Infrastructure: MBA department of RBMI bareilly campus has very good infrastructure with all the modern facilities. Classrooms are fully Air conditioned so that students can learn the lecture with full comfort, concentration and with out being tired. Library has good collection of books, magazine and journals. Digital library facility is also available. Computer lab is also well-equipped. Hotel life is very good, with nice rooms, healthy food and playground to enjoy.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely dissatisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Rakshpal Bahadur Management Institute (RBMI) is the worst college ever. I don't think this college deserves good students because they are not much bothered about the students' career. Only 2-3 students from our batch got placed in the company. The company offered only sales or calling process profile, which is not that good to start the career. They charge a lot of money from the students, but in return, they didn't provide any kind facilities to the students.
content.Infrastructure: The college and the classrooms are just horrible. They didn't provide the labs to the students, but they charge money for every thing. Sport and games facilities are just for the formality. The food served in the canteen is the worst. Hostel rooms are the worst ever. I just hate this college.

paragraphs: Rakshpal Bahadur Management Institute (RBMI), Greater Noida offers various UG & PG courses in the stream of Science, Management, Commerce, Education, etc. These courses are offered in affiliation with CCSU, Meerut. RBMI admissions 2025 are currently open. RBMI Greater Noida admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The institute conducts accepts scores of state/ national-level entrance exams for the respective courses. Read on to know more about Rakshpal Bahadur Management Institute admission 2025.

Candidates seeking admission to RBMI Greater Noida can check out the most updated information related to the RBMI course admissions 2025 in terms of eligibility & selection criteria in the following section:
Find below the detailed admission process for RBMI Greater Noida admission 2025:
Step 1: RBMI Application Process

RBMI application process is completely online. Candidates have to fill an online application form to apply for their desired programme. The application form must be filled with details about personal and educational information. To finalise the application process, candidates have to pay a non-refundable application fee.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

RBMI admissions are both merit and entrance-based. To secure a seat in courses such as BBA, BCA and MCA, candidates are offered direct admission based on their scores obtained in the last qualifying exams of their previous education. Further, for admission to MBA and B.Ed courses, the institute either conducts an aptitude test or accepts scores of CAT/ MAT or any other state-level entrance exams, respectively.
Step 3: Final Admission

Once all the selection rounds are completed, the institute releases merit lists with the names of the selected candidates and conducts counselling for B.Ed courses. Candidates whose names appeared on the merit list will have to pay a certain amount of course fee to secure their seat.

The faculty members are supportive. The hostel area is peaceful, and the wardens of girls' and boys' hostels take care of like parents.

reviews.review_heading: I am thankful to RBMI, Greater Noida, for helping start my career.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. All the required amenities are available for learning. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The hostel has all the facilities, and the food quality is decent and tasty. All kinds of sports events are organised every year, such as cricket, volleyball, and badminton.

reviews.review_heading: Corporate needed management course provided by RBMi Bareilly.
reviews.review_text: MBA department of RBMI bareilly campus has very good infrastructure with all the modern facilities. Classrooms are fully Air conditioned so that students can learn the lecture with full comfort, concentration and with out being tired. Library has good collection of books, magazine and journals. Digital library facility is also available. Computer lab is also well-equipped. Hotel life is very good, with nice rooms, healthy food and playground to enjoy.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The college and the classrooms are just horrible. They didn't provide the labs to the students, but they charge money for every thing. Sport and games facilities are just for the formality. The food served in the canteen is the worst. Hostel rooms are the worst ever. I just hate this college.

reviews.review_heading: A pathetic college with absolutely worse facilities, teaching and placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available, and its speed is 20 Kbps. Labs do not have the proper software and mostly remain empty as no sessions are conducted. The library doesn't have good books. Sports facilities like volleyball are available. The canteen is average with a seating capacity of 50 students. Non-A/C hostel rooms are available. Buildings are mostly empty. Classrooms are average. The campus is green and clean.

reviews.review_heading: This is an average range college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good in condition, but in some cases, the infrastructure looks like external or portable things because of no use only for promotion to the college reputation. Sometimes it is good, but for students rights, it is a bad thing because of political games.

reviews.review_heading: A place where you can enjoy a lot and at the same time, polish yourself with many efforts.
reviews.review_text:
The overall infrastructure is very good.
There are labs for each subject for every department.
The classrooms are good but not air-conditioned.
Only MBA department is air-conditioned, for the faculty and for the students as well.
The college has good facilities for sports.

reviews.review_heading: I'm highly dissatisfied with facilities, faculty & placements. I suggest you choose RBMI, Bareilly.
reviews.review_text: Jio network Wi-Fi facility with only 50 Mb data is provided by our college. Our college has a computer lab, classrooms without air-conditioners and a library where there are books with outdated information. Our college doesn't have a canteen or cafeteria, sports teacher and also extracurricular activities.
